title: 211INFO UTILITY ASSISTANCE UPDATES - 211info
text: 211INFO 211INFO UTILITY ASSISTANCE UPDATES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers up-to-date information about utility assistance available in the tri-county (Portland Metro) area. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Email 211 211 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers 211 211info (503) 222-5555 Alternate (503) 226-3099 Administrative Line 898211 Text Short Code Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Discounted Sewer Service Discounted Water Service Electric Service Payment Assistance Gas Service Payment Assistance Heating Fuel Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES - 211INFO DCM LINE DISASTER SERVICES - GORGE CITIZEN ALERT PROGRAM DISASTER SERVICES - SEVERE WINTER WEATHER INFORMATION SERVICES DISASTER SERVICES - WINTER AND SEVERE WEATHER INFORMATION SERVICES MULTNOMAH COUNTY FOOD - 211INFO SNAP AND FOOD ACCESS HOUSING/SHELTER - COORDINATED ENTRY FOR FAMILIES MULTNOMAH COUNTY HOUSING/SHELTER - MULTNOMAH COUNTY EVICTION PREVENTION PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - MULTNOMAH COUNTY FAMILY SHELTER WAITLIST INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - 211INFO CHILD CARE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - 211INFO COORDINATION CENTER INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - 211INFO MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - 211INFO RESOURCE PARENT SUPPORT INFORMATION SERVICES - 211INFO ICE IMPACT SUPPORT INFORMATION SERVICES - 211INFO INFORMATION AND REFERRAL INFORMATION SERVICES - 211INFO OUTREACH AND MATERIALS REQUESTS INFORMATION SERVICES - 211INFO RESOURCE DEPARTMENT INFORMATION SERVICES - OREGON HIV/STD HOTLINE MONEY MANAGEMENT - 211INFO FINANCIAL WELLNESS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
